title: Version & Backend
description: Current DFlash MLX server version. Updated with each app release.

title: DFlash Draft
description: Enable DFlash speculative decoding. The matching draft model from the [z-lab/dflash](https://huggingface.co/collections/z-lab/dflash) collection is auto-downloaded for the currently running MLX model.

title: DFlash Block Size
description: Block size for DFlash speculative decoding. Default 16; raise for larger drafts at the cost of latency.
